testcases.input: grid = [[1,0],[0,1]] Output: 3 Explanation: Change one 0 to 1 and connect two 1s, then we get an island with area = 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: Change one 0 to 1 and connect two 1s, then we get an island with area = 3.

testcases.input: grid = [[1,1],[1,0]] Output: 4 Explanation: Change the 0 to 1 and make the island bigger, only one island with area = 4.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: Change the 0 to 1 and make the island bigger, only one island with area = 4.

testcases.input: grid = [[1,1],[1,1]] Output: 4 Explanation: Can't change any 0 to 1, only one island with area = 4.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: Can't change any 0 to 1, only one island with area = 4.
